top.title: Comey surrenders over charge of threatening Trump's life in Instagram post
top.summary: Prosecutors say a 2025 seashell photo posted by the former FBI director was a call for violence against Trump.

top.title: Bondi shooting inquiry calls for gun reform and more security at Jewish festivals
top.summary: An interim report says country should prioritise 'nationally consistent' firearms reforms.

top.title: Hegseth clashes with lawmakers over Iran war in nearly six-hour-long hearing
top.summary: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth sparred with Democratic lawmakers during a nearly six-hour-long hearing, in his first time facing questions under oath since the start of the Iran war.

top.title: Musk accuses OpenAI lawyer of trying to 'trick' him in combative testimony
top.summary: Elon Musk was cross-examined on the third day of the trial over his lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI.

top.title: Why friendly AI chatbots might be less trustworthy
top.summary: Researchers found adjusting AI systems to be more warm and friendly to users would result in an "accuracy trade-off".

top.title: Musk accuses Altman of stealing a charity as courtroom battle begins
top.summary: The case over OpenAI's history and public commitments could have major implications for the future of AI.
